candidates.why: This explicit amortization line appears in the operating expense section below gross profit and alongside overhead lines, not as a same-level add-on to the selected COGS bucket ('Cost of services sold' / 'Cost of goods sold and services'). No COGS-specific D&A row is visible.

This is a separate operating amortization line, but nothing indicates it belongs to the selected COGS bucket; it appears more consistent with overhead/intangible amortization outside direct cost lines.
Separate amortization line shown in opex area rather than within the selected COGS rows, so it should not be added to COGS.
Separate amortization line in the operating expense section with no indication it is tied to the selected COGS rows.
Explicit depreciation line appears as a separate operating expense line, not as a COGS-specific D&A line tied to the selected COGS rows.
Separate depreciation line in operating expenses, with no evidence it belongs to the selected COGS bucket.

variables.notes: No explicit COGS-specific depreciation/amortisation row is shown. The visible D&A lines sit in the operating expense section alongside overhead items rather than beside or under the selected COGS rows, so no separate COGS_DA add-back should be made.

candidates.why: This is the top-level summary line for D&A, but it also includes impairment, which must be excluded for this task; therefore it should not be selected despite being the summary line.

Explicit amortization component disclosed separately from the selected XSGA component rows. Since earlier XSGA mapping intentionally excluded depreciation/amortization, this should be added separately to XSGA.
Separate amortization component under the D&A section and outside the selected XSGA component rows, so it should be added separately.
Separate amortization component disclosed outside the selected XSGA component rows; appropriate to add separately.
Separate amortization component shown in the operating section and not embedded in the selected XSGA rows.
Explicit depreciation component disclosed separately from the selected XSGA rows, so it should be added separately.
Explicit depreciation component disclosed separately from the selected XSGA rows, so it should be added separately.
Balancing-value lines appear to reconcile the D&A subtotal to the detailed components, but the label is duplicated in the excerpt and therefore ambiguous to map cleanly.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA component rows explicitly excluded depreciation/amortization, and separate D&A lines are disclosed at the same operating level, so they should be added separately to XSGA. The summary row 'Depreciation / amortization and impairment' is not used because it includes impairment. I excluded the duplicated 'Depreciation and amortization - Balancing value' label because it is ambiguous and could not be uniquely referenced from the excerpt; manual review is warranted if exact reconciliation to the D&A subtotal is required.
